_comment: Near-fresh starting state for the day-in-the-life demo: ONE Claude Code session ('this morning's work') as the single pinned tab. The demo builds UP from here — create a second tab, get a 'needs you' status dot, switch, find — so it reads as clean-install -> create -> juggle. See demos/CONVENTIONS.md 'Profiles'.
description: One Claude Code session as the single starting tab — the day-in-the-life demo grows the multi-tab world from this near-fresh state.
